description:
This quiz evaluates a developer's knowledge of advanced, semantic HTML5 elements beyond basic tags like <div> and <span>, gauging both conceptual understanding and practical usage. It is positioned at an intermediate difficulty level with a light‑hearted, encouraging tone that nudges learners to improve their markup skills. The format mixes code snippets with informal commentary to keep the experience engaging.
Topics: Semantic HTML5 elements, HTML5 best practices, Accessibility considerations, Proper use of structural tags
Audience: Front‑end developers and web designers with basic HTML experience who want to validate and deepen their semantic markup skills.
